limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or budget figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives (edge computing, data centers) without dollar amounts or headcount.
AI narrative is largely aspirational and demand-side (AI as a driver of customer wireless traffic); no deployed AI use cases within SBA's own operations are described with metrics.
Risk disclosure names specific mechanisms (power requirements, competitive disadvantage, cyber/AI adverse impacts) but provides no quantification or named governance bodies, capping score at 3.
